results.name: Global discovery
results.tested: No live browser session with authenticated client org; not executed in this wave.
results.expected: Discover → model → option/casting submit → thread in Messages; agency sees request.

results.name: Shared project mode
results.tested: Static code review: openProjectDiscovery sets sharedProjectId only; handleOptionRequest passes projectId ?? activeProjectId to addOptionRequest; Discover onOptionRequest calls handleOptionRequest(name, id, date) without project id.
results.expected: Request from shared-project Discover uses correct project_id; no read-only conflict with isSharedMode.
results.actual: Wiring may omit sharedProjectId when activeProjectId differs or is null — project_id correctness in shared mode not verified live; plausible bug or edge case.

results.name: Package context
results.tested: Static: ClientWebApp handleOptionRequest merges packageViewState into extra as source: 'package' and packageId; createBookingMessageInClientAgencyChat adds source and package_id to booking metadata when present.
results.expected: Package-initiated request carries package source metadata on B2B booking card where applicable.
results.actual: Code path present; guest-link package UI flow not run in browser.

results.name: Read-only shared link
results.tested: Static: SharedSelectionView renders header + model cards only; no option handlers, no addOptionRequest.
results.expected: External ?shared=1 selection has no option request CTA or hidden write path.
results.actual: No option/casting UI in component tree for this view.

results.name: Territory / agency resolution
results.tested: Not run against live DB/models; code path reviewed only.
results.expected: Correct agency from territory; missing territory shows controlled UX, no silent wrong routing.
results.actual: addOptionRequest uses resolveAgencyForModelAndCountry then models.agency_id fallback; missing country with no fallback shows uiCopy.alerts.missingCountryCode and rolls back optimistic row — behavior not validated with real data.

results.name: Org columns on insert
results.tested: Static: insertOptionRequest call in optionRequests.ts passes organization_id, client_organization_id (same as client org), agency_organization_id from organizations.agency_id lookup; insertOptionRequest in optionRequestsSupabase maps fields.
results.expected: New option_requests rows include organization_id, client_organization_id, agency_organization_id when resolvable.
results.actual: Client store and service accept and send these columns; live INSERT not verified in DB.

results.name: B2B booking card
results.tested: Static: after successful insert, createBookingMessageInClientAgencyChat called when user id, organizationId, and bookingCountryCode present; metadata includes model_id, country_code, date, optional source/package_id.
results.expected: Typed booking message in client↔agency B2B chat after submit.
results.actual: Invocation and metadata shape implemented; conversation content not inspected in live app.

results.name: Option thread
results.expected: Messages sync; threadId aligns with option_requests.id.

results.name: Counter offer
results.tested: Jest: optionRequestsCounterOffer.test.ts passes (mocked Supabase/RPC); no UI cross-user test.
results.expected: Agency counter visible to client; status/history plausible.
results.actual: Unit coverage only; end-to-end negotiation not run.

results.name: Client accept counter
results.tested: Jest covers clientAcceptCounterPrice RPC path (mocks); no UI/calendar integration test.
results.expected: Accept moves to confirmed path; thread vs status consistent.

results.name: Agency accept / model approval
results.tested: Jest: optionRequestsConfirmation.test.ts passes (mocked); linked vs unlinked branches not run with real accounts.
results.expected: Linked model approval path and unlinked path per docs; no obvious race.

results.name: Option → calendar / booking event
results.expected: Confirmation yields expected calendar/booking mirror; no obvious duplicate.
results.actual: Not exercised (triggers/RPCs not validated in this wave).

results.name: Job confirm
results.tested: Code references clientConfirmJobStore / clientConfirmJobOnSupabase; no live job-confirm flow.
results.expected: clientConfirmJob updates calendar/job styling; no phantom duplication.

results.name: Search deep-link
results.tested: Static: GlobalSearchBar onSelectOption sets searchOptionId and tab messages; Messages subtree receives pendingOptionRequestId; useEffect sets messagesSection optionRequests and selectedThreadId then consumes pending id.
results.expected: Agency global search option row opens correct option thread.
results.actual: Wiring consistent in AgencyControllerView; full search UX not clicked in app.

results.name: Shared vs private notes
results.tested: Types/helpers in calendarSupabase (booking_details.shared_notes vs role notes) reviewed only; RLS/party visibility not tested with two orgs.
results.expected: shared_notes timeline vs private fields per role; no obvious mix-up.

results.name: Conflict warning
results.tested: Static: checkCalendarConflict before insert; on has_conflict showAppAlert with uiCopy.calendarValidation; insertOptionRequest still runs afterward (fail-open).
results.expected: Overlap warning only; submit still allowed per docs.
results.actual: Control flow matches documented fail-open pattern.

results.name: Security sanity
results.tested: Spot check: no email matching in optionRequests.ts; option request insert path uses IDs/orgs. No cross-tenant query executed with two agencies.
results.expected: No org leaks; no email-based routing in option flow; org-centric scope.
results.actual: Cross-org isolation not proven without live multi-tenant test; sendAgencyInvitation in optionRequestsSupabase uses email but is a different feature.

results.name: Paywall / admin / login regression
results.tested: This verification wave made no edits to AuthContext, App.tsx, sign-in, paywall core, or admin RPCs; scope-only check.
results.expected: No unintended change to paywall gating or admin/login from this activity.
results.actual: No code changes in forbidden areas during smoke-doc task; live admin login not re-run.

safe_next_fix_candidates: Run CURSOR_OPTION_CASTING_VERIFY.md checklist on staging with Client + Agency + Model accounts (closes NOT_TESTED on items 1, 5, 8–13, 15, 17).

If shared-project project_id bugs appear in QA: pass sharedProjectId (or explicit project id) into handleOptionRequest when isSharedMode so addOptionRequest does not rely solely on activeProjectId (ClientWebApp.tsx).
Optional hardening from audit: uploadOptionDocument audit trail and hasNewMessages semantics — separate small tasks if product priority.
